title: phyllanthus phillyreifolius var. triangularis
intro: Phyllanthus phillyreifolius var. triangularis, also known as the Triangular Leaf Tree, is a variety of the Phyllanthus phillyreifolius plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus phillyreifolius var. triangularis include its ability to improve liver function, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or used in the form of a tincture or capsule, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various ways.
